allow: Bash(cd /c/Code/music_app/music_app/packages/api && node -e "import { initDatabase, getDb } from './src/config/database.js'; initDatabase\(\); const db = getDb\(\); console.log\('Users:', db.prepare\('SELECT id, display_name FROM users'\).all\(\)\); console.log\('Rooms:', db.prepare\('SELECT id, name FROM rooms'\).all\(\)\); console.log\('Songs:', db.prepare\('SELECT youtube_id, title, added_by FROM songs LIMIT 5'\).all\(\)\);")
Bash(cd /c/Code/music_app/music_app/packages/api && rm src/testRecommendations.js src/checkData.js src/debugRecommendations.js src/testRealRecommendations.js)
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr :3000 || echo "Port 3000 not in use")

Bash(cd packages/api && sqlite3 data/jukebox.db "SELECT 'Users:' as table_name, COUNT\(*\) as count FROM users UNION ALL SELECT 'Rooms:', COUNT\(*\) FROM rooms UNION ALL SELECT 'Songs:', COUNT\(*\) FROM songs UNION ALL SELECT 'Votes:', COUNT\(*\) FROM votes UNION ALL SELECT 'Song History:', COUNT\(*\) FROM song_history;")
Bash(taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>/dev/null || echo "No node processes to kill")
